sigWerErrors.reason: 'thấy' means 'see' or 'saw', while 'thế' means 'so' or 'then'; this changes the meaning at the start of the sentence and can derail the intended message.
'làm' means 'do', while 'sẽ' means 'will'; this changes the action from asking what to do next to what will happen next, altering the intent of the sentence.
